---
title: "aria_nbv Overview & Architecture"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show code"
    code-tools: false
---

# What is `aria_nbv`?

- In-repo NBV toolkit (import path `aria_nbv`) for ASE/ATEK + EFM3D experiments.
- Responsibilities: load typed ASE snippets, generate collision‑aware candidate views, render/raycast depth, fuse point clouds, and score Relative Reconstruction Improvement (RRI).

::: {.callout-note title="Source anchors"}
- Data surface: [`AseEfmDatasetConfig`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/data_handling/efm_dataset.py#L33), [`AseEfmDataset`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/data_handling/efm_dataset.py#L320), [`EfmSnippetView`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/data_handling/efm_views.py#L479), [`VinSnippetView`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/data_handling/efm_views.py#L796)
- App orchestration: [`NbvStreamlitAppConfig`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/app/config.py#L23), [`NbvStreamlitApp`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/app/app.py#L79), [`PipelineController`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/app/controller.py#L34)
- Oracle pipeline: [`OracleRriLabeler`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/pipelines/oracle_rri_labeler.py#L80), [`CandidateViewGenerator`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/pose_generation/candidate_generation.py#L319), [`CandidateDepthRenderer`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/rendering/candidate_depth_renderer.py#L108), [`OracleRRI`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/rri_metrics/oracle_rri.py#L34)
- VIN surface: [`VinModelV3Config`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/vin/model_v3.py#L123), [`VinModelV3`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/vin/model_v3.py#L256), [`EvlBackboneOutput`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/vin/types.py#L21), [`VinPrediction`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/vin/types.py#L200)
:::

# Directory layout (code)

```text
aria_nbv/aria_nbv/
├── app/                  # Streamlit shell, controller, state, and page panels
├── configs/              # PathConfig, Optuna, and W&B config surfaces
├── data/                 # Download stats and metadata compatibility helpers
├── data_handling/        # Typed snippet views, dataset loading, mesh/offline-cache contracts
├── interpretability/     # Attribution utilities for VIN diagnostics
├── lightning/            # Training loop, datamodule, and optimizer orchestration
├── pipelines/            # Oracle labeler orchestration
├── pose_generation/      # CandidateViewGenerator + pruning rules
├── rendering/            # Candidate depth and point-cloud rendering
├── rri_metrics/          # Oracle RRI, CORAL, logging, and binning
├── utils/                # BaseConfig, Console, frames, plotting, and schemas
├── vin/                  # VINv3 scorer, encoders, and typed outputs
└── streamlit_app.py      # CLI/Streamlit entrypoint
```

# End-to-end NBV loop

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    A[ASE/ATEK shard<br/>+ GT mesh] --> B[data_handling.efm_dataset<br/>EfmSnippetView]
    B --> C[pose_generation<br/>CandidateViewGenerator]
    C -->|"PoseTW batch + masks"| D[rendering<br/>CandidateDepthRenderer]
    D -->|"Depth to PC (EFM3D utils)"| E[Fused reconstruction P_t+q]
    E --> F[Metrics: RRI / Chamfer]
    F --> G[Policy: choose NBV]
    G -->|"advance pose"| C
```

# Core modules (shortcuts)

- **Config and runtime wiring**: [`PathConfig`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/configs/path_config.py#L21), [`BaseConfig`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/utils/base_config.py#L27), and [`Console`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/utils/console.py#L18) keep the repo on the config-as-factory path.
- **Typed data views**: [`EfmSnippetView`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/data_handling/efm_views.py#L479) and [`VinSnippetView`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/data_handling/efm_views.py#L796) are the current typed payloads consumed by rendering, labeling, and VIN.
- **Dataset handling**: [`AseEfmDataset`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/data_handling/efm_dataset.py#L320) and [`load_or_process_mesh`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/data_handling/mesh_cache.py#L132) own snippet loading and mesh preprocessing.
- **Oracle labeling**: [`OracleRriLabeler`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/pipelines/oracle_rri_labeler.py#L80) coordinates [`CandidateViewGenerator`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/pose_generation/candidate_generation.py#L319), [`CandidateDepthRenderer`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/rendering/candidate_depth_renderer.py#L108), and [`OracleRRI`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/rri_metrics/oracle_rri.py#L34).
- **App surface**: [`NbvStreamlitApp`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/app/app.py#L79) and [`PipelineController`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/app/controller.py#L34) drive the interactive diagnostics UI.
- **VIN surface**: [`VinModelV3`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/vin/model_v3.py#L256) consumes [`EvlBackboneOutput`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/vin/types.py#L21) and emits [`VinPrediction`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/vin/types.py#L200).

# RRI essentials (used by metrics)

Let \(P_t\) be current reconstruction points, \(P_q\) the candidate-view points, \(M\) the GT surface (sampled). Symmetric Chamfer:
$$
\mathrm{CD}(P,M)=\frac{1}{|P|}\sum_{p\in P}\min_{m\in M}\|p-m\|_2^2+\frac{1}{|M|}\sum_{m\in M}\min_{p\in P}\|m-p\|_2^2.
$$
Relative improvement:
$$
\mathrm{RRI}(P_t,P_q,M)=\frac{\mathrm{CD}(P_t,M)-\mathrm{CD}(P_t\cup P_q,M)}{\mathrm{CD}(P_t,M)+\varepsilon},
$$
with small \(\varepsilon\) for stability. Positive RRI ⇒ candidate improves reconstruction.

# External APIs we lean on (from merged oracle_rri_impl)

- **EFM3D**: `PoseTW`, `CameraTW`, `utils.ray.ray_grid/transform_rays`, `utils.pointcloud.dist_im_to_point_cloud_im`, `utils.mesh_utils.eval_mesh_to_mesh`.
- **ATEK**: `load_atek_wds_dataset`, `process_wds_sample`, surface metrics (`surface_reconstruction_metrics.py`).
- **trimesh**: IO, surface sampling, proximity queries, ray intersections; optional pyembree backend.

# Architecture snapshot (class diagram)

```{mermaid}
classDiagram
    class PathConfig
    class AseEfmDataset
    class PipelineController
    class OracleRriLabeler
    class CandidateViewGenerator
    class CandidateDepthRenderer
    class OracleRRI
    class VinModelV3

    PathConfig <.. AseEfmDataset
    PipelineController --> AseEfmDataset : loads snippets
    PipelineController --> CandidateViewGenerator : samples candidates
    PipelineController --> CandidateDepthRenderer : renders depth
    OracleRriLabeler --> CandidateViewGenerator : candidate shells
    OracleRriLabeler --> CandidateDepthRenderer : rendered candidates
    CandidateDepthRenderer --> OracleRRI : candidate point clouds
    OracleRRI --> VinModelV3 : oracle labels / training targets
```

# Where to dive deeper

- Data ingestion & typed views: `data_pipeline_overview.qmd`
- Oracle metric details: `rri_computation.qmd`
- External libraries: `../ext-impl/atek_implementation.qmd`, `../ext-impl/efm3d_implementation.qmd`
- Notebook reference: `../notebooks/ase_oracle_rri_simplified.ipynb`
